shortDescription.en: Bright, floral, and layered with long aftertaste.
shortDescription.zh: 香气清扬，层次分明，回甘持久。

description.en: Classic raw pu'er cake made from East Half Mountain ancient-tree leaves. Suitable for both immediate drinking and long-term storage.
description.zh: 采用东半山古树鲜叶制作的经典生普茶饼，适合当下品饮，也具有长期陈化价值。

shortDescription.en: Smooth, woody, and comforting from the first cup.
shortDescription.zh: 入口顺滑，木质香与甜润感明显。

description.en: Traditionally fermented with spring water in climate-controlled rooms, delivering a clean and mellow profile for everyday tea drinking.
description.zh: 在恒温发酵空间中以传统工艺与泉水发酵，口感干净醇和，适合日常饮用。

shortDescription.en: Pure expression of mountain terroir in loose-leaf form.
shortDescription.zh: 以散茶形态呈现最直接的山场风味。

description.en: Processed without withering or yellowing, preserving the vibrant, living character of fresh Yunnan leaves.
description.zh: 遵循传统晒青工艺，不做萎凋与闷黄，最大程度保留鲜叶活性与山野气息。

shortDescription.en: Taste several tea styles before choosing your favorite.
shortDescription.zh: 一次体验多种风格，快速找到你的偏好。

description.en: Curated for first-time American drinkers, this set includes raw, ripe, and specialty teas with simple brewing guidance.
description.zh: 为海外新手茶友设计，包含生普、熟普与特色茶样，并附基础冲泡建议。

shortDescription.en: Matured profile with depth for collectors.
shortDescription.zh: 陈化香韵明显，适合收藏与深度品鉴。

description.en: Selected batches stored under careful conditions to build complexity over time, suitable for advanced tea enthusiasts.
description.zh: 甄选批次在严格仓储条件下陈化，层次和厚度随年份提升，适合资深爱好者。

shortDescription.en: Soft sweetness with elegant floral aroma.

description.en: Yunnan white tea crafted for gentle daily drinking while retaining enough structure for light aging.
description.zh: 云南白茶风格清柔，兼顾日常饮用与轻度陈化潜力。

description.en: A warm and approachable black tea profile that introduces Yunnan's depth to non-pu'er drinkers.
description.zh: 温润易饮的红茶表达，让更多非普洱用户也能感受云南茶的厚度。

shortDescription.en: Friendly flavor gateway for younger tea drinkers.
shortDescription.zh: 适合年轻人群的风味入口。

description.en: Designed for broader lifestyle tea occasions while still keeping a clean tea core and premium leaves.
description.zh: 面向更广泛生活场景设计，兼顾风味表现与优质茶底。

name.en: East Half Mountain Raw Cake — Selection IX
name.zh: 东半山古树生茶饼 · 精选九号

shortDescription.en: Tight-pressed cake with clean mountain aromatics.

description.en: From the same Mengku East Half Mountain supply chain as our core line. Replace copy with your tasting notes when ready.
description.zh: 与佤赛核心产品线同源。可在上架时替换为具体年份与口感描述。

name.zh: 古树熟茶饼 · 精选十号

description.en: Small-pile style ripe tea from WASAI's fermentation program. Update with batch details as you finalize retail naming.
description.zh: 佤赛小堆熟茶系列。零售命名与批次信息可后续补充。

name.zh: 茶样组合 · 精选十二号

shortDescription.en: Multiple styles in one set for exploration.
shortDescription.zh: 一盒多风格，便于对比品饮。

description.en: Sampler packaging from the white-background product shoot. List exact contents per SKU when you lock the assortment.
description.zh: 白底图茶样组合。确定具体配茶后替换文案。

name.zh: 云南白茶 · 精选十四号

description.en: Yunnan white tea style from the same mountain supply. Refine name and grade with your QC team.
description.zh: 云南白茶风格。品控确定等级后可更新品名。

name.zh: 调味茶 · 精选十六号

shortDescription.en: Aromatic and approachable for new drinkers.

description.en: Lifestyle-oriented blend; list flavor notes and base tea on the label when ready.
description.zh: 风味向产品。上市时请写明调味与茶底。

name.zh: 熟茶饼 · 精选十八号

description.en: Ripe pu'er from controlled fermentation. Add moisture and fermentation notes for B2C pages if needed.
description.zh: 可控发酵熟茶。如需可补充发酵与含水信息。

shortDescription.en: Featured item from the white-background catalog shoot.

description.en: Placeholder listing for the final image in the folder—rename and categorize to match your actual SKU.
description.zh: 文件夹内最后一张白底图。请按真实 SKU 调整品名与分类。
